name: lag_only_online_lms_control
purpose: Preserve the Tier 5.19c requirement that fading memory beat a same-causal-budget lag control on temporal-memory diagnostics.
expected_effect: Lag-only should remain weaker on temporal-memory tasks or the temporal native migration should not be promoted.

name: zero_temporal_state_ablation
purpose: Proves task performance is not carried solely by current input/readout.
expected_effect: Zeroed traces should lose temporal-memory benefit.

name: frozen_temporal_state_ablation
purpose: Matches the v2.2 sham where temporal state stops updating after the train/reference prefix.
expected_effect: Frozen state should not match the active temporal trace on held-out temporal tasks.

name: shuffled_temporal_state_sham
purpose: Destroys temporal ordering while preserving marginal state distribution.
expected_effect: Shuffled state should lose temporal-memory benefit.

name: state_reset_interval_control
purpose: Checks whether the claimed memory horizon survives forced resets.
expected_effect: Short reset interval should reduce long-memory performance.

name: shuffled_target_control
purpose: Detects label/target leakage through the temporal path.

name: no_plasticity_ablation
purpose: Separates temporal state availability from learning/readout adaptation.
expected_effect: No-plasticity path must not pass promoted learning claims.

name: hidden_recurrence_excluded_control
purpose: Keeps Tier 4.31 aligned with the narrowed v2.2 claim.
expected_effect: First native gate must not include hidden tanh recurrent units or recurrent weight matrices.
